creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: amdmi3
Date: Wed Apr 23 14:57:46 2014
New Revision: 351953
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351953
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351953/

Log:
  - Update to 2.2.0
  - Switched to shebangfix
  
  PR:		188739
  Submitted by:	Hans Fredrik Nordhaug <hans@nordhaug.priv.no> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/piwik/Makefile
  head/www/piwik/distinfo
  head/www/piwik/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/piwik/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/piwik/Makefile	Wed Apr 23 14:55:07 2014	(r351952)
+++ head/www/piwik/Makefile	Wed Apr 23 14:57:46 2014	(r351953)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	piwik
-PORTVERSION=	2.1.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.0
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://builds.piwik.org/
 
@@ -25,10 +25,8 @@ PHPMYSQLI_USE=	PHP=mysqli
 
 PLIST_SUB+=	WWWOWN=${WWWOWN} WWWGRP=${WWWGRP}
 
-post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/bin/python|${LOCALBASE}/bin/python|' \
-		${WRKSRC}/misc/log-analytics/import_logs.py
-	@${RM} ${WRKSRC}/misc/log-analytics/import_logs.py.bak
+USES=		shebangfix
+SHEBANG_FILES=	misc/log-analytics/import_logs.py
 
 pre-install:
 	@if [ ! -f ${LOCALBASE}/bin/php ]; then \

==============================================================================
